## Checklist

- [ ] Substantive doc or copy-bundle changes follow the maintainer checklist in `CONTRIBUTING.md` (including cross-links and quick-start paths if touched).
- [ ] Outcome or skill-mapping changes were applied to `docs/outcomes.md` first, then mirrored in other docs as needed.
- [ ] Skill IDs were not renamed without a strong compatibility reason (`AGENTS.md`).

## Security

If this change could affect unsafe commands, credential handling, or operational guidance, confirm you did **not** put sensitive details in the PR description; use `SECURITY.md` for private reporting when appropriate.
